title: Split Text Into Token-Budget Chunks
description: Split a long string into word-chunks that each fit under a token budget.
problem: Write split_into_chunks(text, max_words) that splits text into a list of chunks, each containing at most max_words words, preserving word order.
starter_code:
def split_into_chunks(text, max_words):
    # Split text on whitespace and group into chunks of max_words
    words = text.split()
    return [words]  # fix this
hint: Slice the words list in steps of max_words: words[i:i+max_words], then ' '.join each slice.
